title: Computational Biology and In Silico Working Group
content:
Computational Biology and In Silico Working Group

Research Focus

The Computational Biology and In silico Studies Group uses various bioinformatics tools to identify genes involved in diseases (especially neurodegenerative diseases and cancer) and/or important cellular pathways, to identify gene-gene interactions, to predict polymorphisms that may affect the structure and function of proteins that are the products of genes, and to model proteins structurally.
